text:
おたくなら、とっくに火山洞窟へ
行ってるよな？

あそこ、マジつらくね？
龍族の連中、オレを見かけた途端
一斉に襲ってきやがるしさ！

そんなの逃げるしかねーじゃん？
え？　全部、倒せばいいって？
無理だって！

じゃあまず、おたくの手本を
見せてくれよな！
そんなわけで、ヨロ

I'm gonna go out on a limb here and
say you've probably been to the Volcanic
Caves already.

It's brutal in there, ain't it? Those Draconians
all rushed me the moment they spotted me!

If running ain't the answer there, what is?
What's that? Just take 'em all out? Hell no,
that ain't happenin'!

Well if it's so easy, how 'bout you show me
how to do it, huh? I'm waiting!
